architecture_notes: Keep PeerConnections as a facade over startup coordination and URL-establishment adapters.

children.name: StartupCoordinator
children.responsibility: Starts peer establishment in parallel, tries each peer's URLs in order, records the winning URL, reports unreachable peers, and decides fatal startup reachability.

children.name: FileUrlConnection
children.responsibility: Establishes file URLs by preparing or rejecting the local peer root according to run mode while ignoring SFTP connection settings.

children.name: SftpUrlConnection
children.responsibility: Establishes SFTP URLs with handshake timeout selection, known-host trust, credential fallback, and remote root preparation.
